UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF MAY-31-2022 NOTICE OF HEARING ON JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT AND STIPULATION TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-31-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. COUNSEL WILL SUBMIT STIPULATED JUDGMENTS FOR THE COURT'S APPROVAL UPON REVIEW. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. COURT REPORTER ROBIN CASILLAS CSR14042.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OUNG, CAROLINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONNELL, STEPHEN CONNELL, SUSAN R. THE TESTATE AND INTESTATE SUCCESSORS OF THE DECEASED GEORGE H CONNELL, AND ALL PERSONS CLAIMING BY, THROUGH OR UNDER SUCH DECEDENT ALL PERSONS UNKNOWN CLAIMING ANY LEGAL OR EQUITABLE RIGHT, TITLE, ESTATE, LIEN, OR INTEREST IN THE PROPERTY ADVERSE TO PLAINTIFF'S TITLE, OR ANY CLOUD ON PLAINTIFF'S TITLE TO THE PROPERTY SEE SCANNED DOC - (1) THE DEED TO THE SUBJECT PROPERTY COMMONLY KNOW AS 245-249A EUREKA STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA IS REVISED SUCH THAT THE LEGAL DESCRIPTION NOW INCLUDES THE FOLLOWING TO STATE: "COMMENCING AT A POINT ON THE EASTERLY LINE OF EUREKA STREET, DISTANT THERERON TWO HUNDRED FORTY-FIVE (245) FEET FROM THE NORTHLY LINE OF 20TH STREET; RUNNING THENCE NORTHLY AND ALONG SAID LINE OF EUREKA STREET, THIRTY (30) FEET; THENCE AT A RIGHT ANGLE EASTERLY ONE HUNDRED AND TWENTY-FIVE (125) FEET; THENCE AT A RIGHT ANGLE SOUTHERLY THIRTY (30) FEET; THENCE AT A RIGHT ANGLE WESTERLY ONE HUNDRED AND TWENTY-FIVE (125) TO THE POINT OF COMMENCEMENT; (2) TITLE IS QUIETED IN CAROLINE OUNG TO THE SUBJECT PROPERTY AS DESCRIBED ABOVE IN THE REFORMED DEED; AND (3) DECLARATORY RELIEF IS GRANTED THAT CAROLINE OUNG IS THE SOLE OWNER OF THE OMITTED AREA REFERENCED ABOVE IN THE REFORMED DEED TO THE SUBJECT PROPERTY.

Notice Of Hearing On Judgment By Default And Stipulation
Off Calendar Apr-15-2022 Continued To May-31-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

Notice Of Hearing On Judgment By Default And Stipulation
Off Calendar Jul-25-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Stipulated Judgment Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Stephen Connell, Susan Connell and The O'Toole Family Trust.

Patricia Rosenberg, Esq. appeared via Zoom for Plaintiff Carolyn Oung Also on Zoom.

Appearance by Expert Witness Kim Spencer via Zoom

The plaintiff and Expert Witness were placed under oath, only Mr. Spencer testified.

No appearance by defendants Stephen Connell, Susan Connell and The O'Toole Family Trust.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Quite Title- Real Property filed by Plaintiff was initially filed Jan-10-2018 and first Amended on Feb-01-2021 served on defendants.

Default as to defendant Stephen Connell was entered on 5/6/2019. All three Defendants have signed three separate Stipulated Judgments.

Doe defendants Dismissed in plaintiff's complaint on 07/30/2021.

After reviewing the documents, evidence presented, and the testimony provided by Kim Spencer and the Stipulated Judgments signed by the three defendants, Court is prepared to grant the Plaintiff's request to enter a judgment in favor of plaintiff, and to grant the request to conform the deed of, also referred to and the subject property, located at 245 -249A Eureka Street, San Francisco, CA. to be revised such that the legal description would include the omitted area to state commencing at a point of the easterly line of Eureka street distant thereon 245 feet form the northerly line of 20th Street running thence northerly and along said line of Eureka Street 30 feet; thence at a right angle easterly 125 feet; thence at the right angle southernly 30 feet; thence at a right angle westerly 125 feet to the point of commencement. Being part of Horner's Addition Block No. 210. That request is granted.
It is further granted that Plaintiff Oung, Quite Title has Declaratory Relief and is the sole owner of the omitted area just described by the court in the reformed deed referred to as the subject property above.

Counsel will submit the stipulated judgments Orders for the Court's approval upon review.

The request to the Court to maintain Jurisdiction is denied.

Judge: Michelle Tong. Clerk: R. Sahatjian. Reporter: Robin Casillas CSR#14042 provided by counsel.(FTR commencing at 10:15)
